# unpublishArticle <kbd>Mutation</kbd>

> Unpublish a live article, moving it back to DRAFT status.
> 
> The article becomes invisible to public readers but retains
> all its content, comments, and metadata. The `publishedAt`
> field is preserved for historical reference.

**Defined in:** `procedures.zmodel`

<details>
<summary>Declaration · <code>procedures.zmodel</code></summary>

```prisma
mutation procedure unpublishArticle(
    articleId: String
): Article
```

</details>
